\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4713 introduces Modal Frequency Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. \paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation}\n\\omega_{nl}^\\text{ac} = \\omega_{n'l'}^B + \\frac{mc}{R_\\text{KK}} \\quad (m \\in \\mathbb{Z})\n\\end{equation}
